link_text: Find a WIC office Near YouWomen, Infants and Children (WIC) provides access to healthy food, nutrition education, breastfeeding support and more.

WIC Clinic Hours and Locations
There are 4 WIC clinics in San Francisco. Find one closest to you.
Maternal, Child, and Adolescent Health
Zuckerberg San Francisco General Hospital WIC Clinic
2550-23rd Street, Bldg.9, Room 125
San Francisco, CA 94110
Phone: (628) 206-5494
Email:
zsfgwic@sfdph.org
Clinic Hours:
Monday-Friday 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM (Open during lunch)
On Wednesdays, we operate remotely.
Silver Avenue Family Health Center WIC Clinic
1525 Silver Avenue
San Francisco, CA 94134
Phone: (628) 754-8090
Email:
sawic@sfdph.org
Clinic Hours
:
Monday-Friday 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM (Open during lunch)
On Wednesdays, we operate remotely.
Ocean Park Health Center WIC Clinic
1351 24th Ave
San Francisco, CA 94122
Phone: (628) 754-8290
Email:
opwic@sfdph.org
Clinic Hours:
Tuesday, Thursday & Friday 8:00 AM-5:00 PM.  Closed 12:00 PM-1:00 PM
WIC Clinic at Human Services Agency
1440 Harrison St.
San Francisco, CA 94103
Phone: (628) 217-6890
